instructions: Replace every placeholder with controlled labels and wallet addresses. Do not commit private keys, seed phrases, or secrets.

cases.label: REPLACE_UNWRAPPED_LABEL
cases.notes: Direct unwrapped *.club.agi.eth currently owned in ENS Registry by this wallet.

cases.label: REPLACE_CURRENT_WRAPPER_LABEL
cases.notes: Direct name controlled through the official ENS Ethereum Mainnet Name Wrapper with future expiry.

cases.label: REPLACE_OPTIONAL_MAINNET_WRAPPER_LABEL
cases.notes: Optional: use only an independently verified additional Ethereum Mainnet wrapper deliberately added to config.json. Otherwise record N/A. Never use the Sepolia wrapper.

cases.label: REPLACE_EXPIRED_LABEL
cases.notes: Wrapped expiry is in the past.

cases.label: REPLACE_TRANSFERRED_LABEL
cases.notes: The direct membership was transferred away from this wallet.

cases.label: REPLACE_VALID_LABEL
cases.notes: Valid direct membership, deliberately tested from a different MetaMask account.

cases.label: x.REPLACE_VALID_LABEL.club.agi.eth
cases.notes: Nested input must be rejected before any chain read or signature request.
